governance.purpose: Governance reports, directive compliance, conscience signals, audit results

academy.purpose: Streeling University course announcements, research cycle results, curriculum updates

research.purpose: Ideation discussions, Seldon research outputs, cross-model validation results

dev-ops.purpose: CI status, health scores, driver cycle summaries, cross-repo sync

channel_creation_script: Use Discord REST API: POST /guilds/{guild_id}/channels with bot token. See setup instructions below.
setup_instructions: Run: node scripts/create-channels.js (in demerzel-bot repo) or use Discord server settings UI to create channels manually, then update IDs here.
